text.title: Spatial Computing Overview Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: prosumer productivity tool — visionOS primary, WebXR fallback.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: 3D model-review tool for industrial designers. Audience = prosumer (small CAD firms). Content type = floating windows + 3D model inspection. Budget supports two platforms in year-one.

section.title: Resulting decision record
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. Steering committee signs decision. Engineering scopes RealityKit primary build + WebXR Three.js fallback. Reassess at 6-month checkpoint.
